Midjourney

March 10, 2026
5 min read

prompt

Create a retro, vintage-inspired image - grainy yet bright with little sun rays based on the reference picture. The boy should be wearing a light maroon shirt, paired with plated off-white pants styled in a Pinterest-inspired aesthetic. The vibe must capture the essence of a 90s movie dark-brown-haired baddie, hair waving by a windy, romantic atmosphere. Standing under the aesthetic street light and reading a book as a few leaves blow in the air, while dramatic contrasts add mystery and artistry to the scene, creating a moody yet enchanting atmosphere.

#midjourney#portrait#galaxy#cinematic

March 8, 2026

prompt

A photorealistic portrait of the person from the uploaded image. A handsome South Indian man with a neat beard and mustache, wearing a sharp black suit jacket over a crisp white shirt, and black trousers. He is leaning casually against a dark grey wall with his hands in his pockets, looking at the viewer with a friendly smile. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the textures of his clothing.
